Class IntegerLDT

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.LDT
de.uka.ilkd.key.ldt.IntegerLDT
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named
public final class IntegerLDT extends LDT
This class inherits from LDT and implements all method that are necessary to handle integers, shorts and bytes. It caches the symbols declared in integerHeader.key and offers methods to convert java number types to their logic counterpart.

    • getIndex

      public Function getIndex()
      Placeholder for the loop index variable in an enhanced for loop over arrays. Follows the proposal by David Cok to adapt JML to Java5.

    • getFunctionFor

      public Function getFunctionFor(Operator op, Services serv, ExecutionContext ec)
      returns the function symbol for the given operation null if no function is found for the given operator
      Specified by:
      getFunctionFor in class LDT
      Returns:
      the function symbol for the given operation

    • getFunctionFor

      public @Nullable Function getFunctionFor(String op, Services services)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      get the function in this LDT for an operation identified by generic operationName. If the LDT does not support this named function, it should return null.

      This is used to resolve overloaded symbols.

      For example: "+" may map to "add" for integers, and to "addFloat" for floats.

      Overrides:
      getFunctionFor in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - non-null operationName for a generic function
      services - services to use
      Returns:
      reference to the respective LDT-specific function for the operation, null if not available

    • isResponsible

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, JTerm[] subs, Services services, ExecutionContext ec)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the logic subterms
      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      subs - the logic subterms of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms

    • isResponsible

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, JTerm left, JTerm right, Services services, ExecutionContext ec)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given binary java operator and the logic subterms
      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      left - the left subterm of the java operator
      right - the right subterm of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterms

      public boolean isResponsible(Operator op, JTerm sub, TermServices services, ExecutionContext ec)
      Description copied from class: LDT
      returns true if the LDT offers an operation for the given unary java operator and the logic subterms
      Specified by:
      isResponsible in class LDT
      Parameters:
      op - the de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.Operator to translate
      sub - the logic subterms of the java operator
      services - the Services
      ec - the ExecutionContext in which the expression is evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the LDT offers an operation for the given java operator and the subterm

    • getArithModuloChar

      maps an integer back into char range

    • getArithJavaIntAddition

      public Function getArithJavaIntAddition()
      returns the function symbol interpreted as the Java addition on int (or promotabel to int) operators, i.e. this addition performs a modulo operation wrt. to the range of type int. This function is independent of the chosen integer semantics.
      Returns:
      mathematical interpreted function realising the Java addition on operands of or promotable to type int

    • getBitwiseOrJavaInt

      public Function getBitwiseOrJavaInt()
      returns the function symbol representing the bitwise-or for Java int

    • getJavaCastByte

      public Function getJavaCastByte()
      the function representing the Java operator (byte)
      Returns:
      function representing the generic Java operator JavaDLFunction

      the function representing the Java operator (char)
      Returns:
      function representing the generic Java operator function

      Returns:
      function representing the generic Java operator function

      the function representing the Java operator (long)
      Returns:

      Returns:

      Returns:

    • getJavaMod

      public Function getJavaMod()
      the function representing the Java operator % when one of the operands is an or a subtype of int
      Returns:
      function representing the generic Java operator function

    • getJavaMulInt

      public Function getJavaMulInt()
      the function representing the Java operator * when one of the operands is an or a subtype of int
      Returns:
      function representing the generic Java operator function

    • getJavaSubInt

      public Function getJavaSubInt()
      the function representing the Java operator - when one of the operands is an or a subtype of int
      Returns:
      function representing the generic Java operator function

    • zero

      public JTerm zero()

    • one
